features: Targeted Effectiveness: Achieve optimal pH balance and eliminate unwanted odor. Unlike oral probiotics, our vaginal probiotics are applied directly for fast and effective results, enhancing vaginal health and preventing BV.

Exclusive Patented Formula: Introducing LACTO BVTC - a patented Korean probiotic blend. Combining lactobacillus with 6 natural ingredients, it's a breakthrough in feminine wellness you won't find anywhere else.

Scientifically Backed Results: Trust in the power of science. Clinically proven benefits through rigorous trials include pH balancing, candida reduction, skin moisturization, and strengthening of the natural barrier.

Simple, Clean Application: Enjoy convenient, hygienic use with individually packed doses. The syringe-like design allows for easy, mess-free application. For best results, apply one dose before bedtime, and avoid use during active hours as the product may leak during movement.

Uncompromised Safety: Your well-being is our priority. Every ingredient is EWG verified, maintaining optimal pH levels and alleviating odor and irritation. Rest easy, knowing you're using a product that cares for you.
parentTitle: LACTOMEDI Intimate Care Gel | Vaginal Probiotics Applicator | Yeast Infection Care | 99% Candida Removal | Optimal pH 4.5 | Itchiness and Unpleasant Odor
safetyWarning: After opening the cap, use the product immediately and do not reuse it. Women in gestational periods or in later stage of pregnancy should not use it. Not suitable for children under 3 years of age.
title: LACTOMEDI Intimate Care Gel | 10-Day Intensive Care Package | Vaginal Probiotics Applicator | Yeast Infection Care | BV Care for Women | pH Balance Gel | Itchiness and Unpleasant Odor | 1Box x 10pcs
